mechanics.excerpt: with the destruction of Clan Smoke Jaguar and the Crusaders loss t0 the Inner Sphere the Great Refusal Strana Mechty; the Wardens dominate Clan politics. Though they favor solationism; the Wardens crave martial victories as much as any Clansman: Despite being unwilling participants in the invasion of the Inner Sphere they considered it matter of nonor do their best.
